backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, bot start/stop controls, configurable spread/interval/numOrders, activity logging, and open/history order tracking.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their roles in the ICDex grid bot dashboard UI.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the ICDex ICP/ckUSDT Trading Bot React app, mounting the app at the root div and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app layout composing the header, footer, and a responsive dashboard grid of all panel components (control, config, market data, grid preview, open orders, trade history, activity log).
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: React component that fetches and displays paginated bot activity log entries with color-coded event types, loading skeletons, error state, and empty state.
React component providing start/stop bot controls with live status indicator, config summary, and user-friendly error display distinguishing network reachability from other errors.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save button that simulates saving since config changes require redeployment.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays the current grid levels (buy/sell) fetched from the backend in a scrollable table, with loading skeletons, error states, and a mid-price indicator derived from the grid data.
Shows live market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book levels) with dynamic status badges (LIVE/IDLE/STALE/ERROR) and a relative-time ticker that updates every second.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price in a scrollable table, with buy/sell counts, a cancel-all button that calls the backend mutation, and loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays trade history sorted reverse-chronologically with side, price, quantity, status, and relative timestamp columns, including loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, wrapping AuthClient to handle login, logout, and persisted identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating trading bot state (status, config, orders, logs) via the ICP canister actor, with polling intervals and canister health checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up a terminal-style dark theme using Tailwind and OKLCH CSS variables, including custom scrollbars, trading semantic color tokens, and utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (buy/sell/terminal), custom shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing an ICDex grid trading bot dashboard where the bot starts but open orders don't appear, with pending tasks to add detailed step-by-step logging to the backend tradingLoop() function.
